Lore Item
Slot: LEGS
AC: 12
STR: +3
SV MAGIC: +5
WT: 8.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: LEGS
AC: 12
STR: +3
SV MAGIC: +5
WT: 8.0 Size: LARGE

Agreed. My Dwarf Pally is wearing them on Druzzil Ro, and they fit him mighty well.
▲ Page top
drops
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2001 at 3:04 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749817370
Scholar
397 posts
Greaves of avoidance drop common from klaggan iceshard (dude that hits for 195s next to his cleric brother in manor above lake)
his rare is engraved skull amulet 3ac 7svmagic all all

only killed vorken iceshard once and he dropped the vambraces of avoidance, which are way better considering iksar warrior can wear them and they weigh way less =)

I tried selling these greaves for friggin 200 plat one day and noone would buy them... they ended up on a merchant.
▲ Page top
these suck!

37 posts
If you're in velius...go to skyfire and get Guardian Greaves....same AC, but a TON of added stats!

# Mar 14 2002 at 12:50 AM Rating: Decent
Debalic
Prodigal Son
20,643 posts

publiusvarus wrote:
we all know liberals are well adjusted american citizens who only want what's best for society. While conservatives are evil money grubbing scum who only want to sh*t on the little man and rob the world of its resources.
▲ Page top
they're fine
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2001 at 5:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758694412
2 posts
AC helps FAR more with avoiding hits & mitigating damage than AGI... AGI just gives you a point of AC for every few points of it. Sooo... nice AC upgrade from Mithril & keeps the same MR (helps 'avoid' spells), I don't see the problem. I'll be buying a pair myself to replace my mithril if/when I can find a seller on Xev.
▲ Page top
RE: they're fine
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2002 at 1:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769051269
74 posts
Agi is nice, becuase it will help you dodge, riposte, parry... Least I believe this is how it works, seems as though when I get agi boost, I do dodge more on average than without it. /shrug who knows, but every skill is worth upping, in some small way or another. Which is why primal weapons are still used by uber guilders, because of the AWSOME stat increase they get off the proc. Does them so well that they will trade the better ratio and faster NToV weapons or other extreme uber mobs weapons to still get that proc.
▲ Page top
where how
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2001 at 7:55 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
anyone know where these drop or how to get them??
▲ Page top
Avoidance Armor
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 7:34 PM Rating: Decent
Draggun
21 posts
Hail,

This armor is peculiar, especially considering the zone it drops in, Kael Drakkel.
So far I know of 2 pieces:

Greaves of Avoidance AC 12 Str +3 SvMagic +5
Vambraces of Avoidnace AC 12 Str +3 SvMagic +5

They seemed to be related to Mithril Armor. These carry less STR, more AC, and same SvMagic. I would expect them to carry DEX or AGI.

I expect these items to be quest related (again, considering the zone they drop in). Hope this helps and we get more information on them. Safe travels.
____________________________
Raktavija Seraphim - Rainbow Powered Blade Dancer
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=744588

Draggun Brellfyre - High Templar of Brell
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=105732

157 posts
I can agree no agi on Greaves of AVOIDANCE. That is odd. But mith greaves r a lil outta my reach. So i want to know what, who, where this drops. And if some1 could tell me a price it would be very nice.

Sheane
